title: Optimism Swap - Open App
meta_description: optimism swap opens a direct route to trade tokens on OP Mainnet through the official Uniswap app, with network and domain checks.
hero_h2: Trade tokens on OP Mainnet through Uniswap
hero_lead: Optimism Swap connects you to the Uniswap web app for token trades on OP Mainnet, with a clean route to check the network, wallet prompt, and destination domain before signing.
what_is: Optimism Swap is a focused route for trading tokens on OP Mainnet, not a separate exchange or wallet. It points users to Uniswap's official interface while keeping network details aligned with Optimism network information.

how.d: Use the primary button to open Uniswap with the Optimism chain context.
Confirm the domain is app.uniswap.org before approving any wallet prompt.
Keep both assets on OP Mainnet and make sure you have ETH available for gas.
Check token addresses, price impact, route, and minimum received before submitting.

points.p: The action opens Uniswap, a recognized swap interface, instead of collecting wallet secrets or custodying funds.
OP Mainnet uses chain ID 10 and ETH as the gas token, so wallet network prompts should match those details.
After a transaction is submitted, its status and token movement can be checked on the OP Mainnet explorer.

faq.a: Optimism swap is a landing route for token trades on OP Mainnet; the trade itself happens in the Uniswap app at app.uniswap.org.

faq.q: Is optimism swap the official Optimism app?
faq.a: No. This page is not operated by Optimism Foundation; it routes swap intent to Uniswap and asks users to verify the destination domain before connecting a wallet.

faq.q: Which network does optimism swap use?
faq.a: It is focused on OP Mainnet, which Optimism documents as chain ID 10 with ETH as the currency symbol for gas.

faq.q: Do I need ETH for optimism swap?
faq.a: Yes. You need ETH on OP Mainnet for transaction gas and the tokens you intend to trade on the same network.
The primary action opens https://app.uniswap.org/swap?chain=optimism; confirm app.uniswap.org in the address bar before signing.

footer_note: This page is not the official app; verify app.uniswap.org before connecting a wallet. Educational content only, not financial advice.
